summary.text:
[0-8] A static title card features a black and white dog facing right, its fur heavily dusted with snowflakes against a white background. Large red text reading "BRUCE THE BORDER COLLIE" spans the top, while vertical blue text on the right edge reads "IN THE DEEP SNOW". A thin green border surrounds the frame.
[8-14] The scene transitions to a wide shot of a snowy landscape under a white, overcast sky. In the foreground, a clump of vegetation is heavily laden with snow. Further back on a rising snow-covered hill, a dark-clad figure walks leftward near a smaller dark shape, traversing the deep white terrain.

[14-16] The camera shifts, moving snow-laden vegetation left while a dark figure stands atop the hill's crest right, with scattered footprints in the foreground snow under a grey sky. [16-22] The dark-clad figure walks away, ascending the snowy slope toward the right side; a small black dog becomes visible near the snow-covered vegetation then moves to walk directly beside the person's legs as deep footprints trail through the white terrain. [22-28] The person in dark outerwear descends the snowy hill directly toward the camera, with the small black dog trotting near their legs, following a distinct trail of footprints extending from the frame bottom up the slope past snow-covered vegetation in the lower left.

[28-40] A figure in dark winter outerwear and a backpack descends a snowy slope toward the camera, accompanied by a small black and white dog moving through deep snow. The pair advances along a trail of footprints, with the dog trotting near the person's legs, its body partially obscured by the white drifts. Snow-covered vegetation remains visible in the lower left foreground, while a thin vertical marker pole appears on the far right edge. As they get closer, the dog's head is visible above the snow, and the person continues walking steadily down the hill against the overcast, white background.

[40-44] A hiker in dark clothing with a red side stripe on their trousers and a black and white dog reach the immediate foreground, trudging through deep snow drifts. The dog trots with its mouth open, revealing a pink tongue. [44-50] The view shifts to an extreme close-up of the dog's head and upper body, heavily dusted with snowflakes on its dark fur. The hiker's snow-covered leg and boot are visible trudging alongside as the dog pants and turns its head. [50-54] The black and white dog continues walking forward with its head lowered through the white drifts. A bright orange harness or vest on its chest becomes visible, partially covered in powder, while the hiker's legs remain visible stepping behind the animal in the deep snow.

[54-60] A black and white dog with a visible pink tongue trudges through deep snow, ears perked and partially submerged, advancing toward the camera while a hiker in snow-dusted dark trousers, boots, and camouflage clothing walks beside it. [60-62] The hiker's camouflage-gloved hands reach down to rest on the dog's snow-covered upper back and neck as the animal moves forward with its mouth slightly open. [62-68] The hiker, wearing a camouflage jacket, bends forward and wraps their arms around the dog's neck and upper body, holding the animal steady between their snow-covered legs as the dog faces slightly left in the deep white drifts.

[68-76] A hiker in a snow-covered camouflage jacket bends forward, wrapping arms around a black and white dog standing between their legs in deep snow. The dog faces forward with snow clinging to its fur, its tongue slightly visible, as the hiker maintains a steady hold on the animal's upper body.
[76-80] The camera tilts sharply upward to a grey overcast sky, revealing the brim of a camouflage hat. A large, blurry, snow-dusted dark shape moves extremely close to the lens, obscuring part of the view.
[80-82] The angle lowers to show a figure in the distance wearing a bright orange jacket and a large black backpack covered in snow, walking against a snowy hillside with sparse vegetation.

[82-86] A man wearing a camouflage bucket hat and a bright orange jacket with grey shoulders stands in falling snow, carrying a large black backpack. He smiles broadly, looking right then slightly toward the lens as snow dusts his hat. [86-88] The camera tilts down to reveal deep white snow marked by dark footprints and holes near low bushes. [88-96] The view shifts to a snowy hillside where dense bushes heavily coated in snow line a ridge against a grey sky, with small dark, spiky plants protruding from the deep foreground drifts in a static wintry scene.

[96-100] The camera pans left across a snowy landscape, revealing a grey patch of ice or water on the left and dark, spiky vegetation protruding from white drifts in the foreground, shifting rightward, while a dense ridge of snow-covered bushes lines the background under a grey sky. [100-106] The camera pans right across the white terrain, causing the grey ice patch on the left to move further out of the frame, while dark vegetation remains in the foreground and the snow-covered bushes stay visible along the top. [106-110] The camera tilts downward and pans right, causing the background ridge of bushes and the ice patch to exit completely; the view is restricted to the immediate foreground, filled with textured white snow and scattered dark fragments of vegetation, including small sticks and leaves, protruding from the drifts.

From 110s to 122s, the camera maintains a tight close-up perspective, panning slowly across a white snow surface. Initially, small dark fragments of vegetation and sticks protrude from deep drifts. As the view shifts, these debris elements disappear, leaving an almost featureless expanse of smooth, undulating snow filling the frame with uniform white texture. The background remains excluded. Towards the end, the camera scans the ground, revealing subtle drift undulations and a few small dark specks or holes near the top edge, but no distinct objects, people, or background elements enter the view.

[122-126] The camera maintains a close-up view of a white, undulating snow surface, panning slightly to reveal small dark holes and vegetation fragments near the top left. [126-130] A distinct grey patch becomes visible on the left side before the camera pans right, causing it to exit the frame. The view focuses on the textured drifts and scattered debris under flat, overcast lighting. [130-134] The perspective continues shifting over the ground, showing only the smooth white snow and persistent dark fragments in the upper left, with no new objects or figures entering the scene.

[134-140] The camera pans slowly across undulating white snow, showing small dark holes and vegetation fragments in the upper left. Dark, snow-covered rocks become prominent in the corner, while a distinct triangular hole persists in the center of the smooth drifts.
[140-144] The view tilts up and left, revealing snow-covered bushes along the top and left edges. The focus shifts from the specific hole to a wider expanse of white drifts bordering the vegetation, with a dark rock fragment visible in the lower left.
[144-148] A white curved branch appears on the left near dark vegetation. The camera then moves forward to show a snowy path bordered by dense, snow-laden bushes on both sides, featuring exposed dark patches on the ground that indicate a trail.

[148-152] The camera advances along a winding trail with dark, exposed earth and rocks amidst snow. Dense, white snow-coated vegetation lines the path.
[152-158] The view tilts down to the rugged ground, showing dark mud, scattered rocks, melting snow, and exposed roots on the right. The perspective focuses on the textured, uneven terrain directly beneath.
[158-162] Tilting upward, the camera reveals snow-covered terrain and a distinct snow-laden plant. The scene expands to dense evergreen trees and bushes heavily coated in thick white snow against a grey, overcast sky.

The view shifts to a close-up of a person in camouflage gear, with a bag featuring "STONE CREEK" text and a red logo visible on the left. The camera tilts downward to reveal the lower body, showing camouflage pants and dark boots standing on snowy, muddy ground, alongside a red strap hanging vertically near the legs. A black and white dog wearing a red collar enters from the bottom left, walking across the snowy, muddy terrain. [8-14] The scene transitions to a wide shot of a snowy landscape under a white, overcast sky. In the foreground, a clump of vegetation is heavily laden with snow. Further back on a rising snow-covered hill, a dark-clad figure walks leftward near a smaller dark shape, traversing the deep white terrain. [14-16] The camera shifts, moving snow-laden vegetation left while a dark figure stands atop the hill's crest right, with scattered footprints in the foreground snow under a grey sky. [16-22] The dark-clad figure walks away, ascending the snowy slope toward the right side; a small black dog becomes visible near the snow-covered vegetation then moves to walk directly beside the person's legs as deep footprints trail through the white terrain. [22-28] The person in dark outerwear descends the snowy hill directly toward the camera, with the small black dog trotting near their legs, following a

[40-44] A hiker in dark clothing with a red side stripe on their trousers and a black and white dog reach the immediate foreground, trudging through deep snow drifts. The dog trots with its mouth open, revealing a pink tongue. [44-50] The view shifts to an extreme close-up of the dog's head and upper body, heavily dusted with snowflakes on its dark fur. The hiker's snow-covered leg and boot are visible trudging alongside as the dog pants and turns its head. [50-54] The black and white dog continues walking forward with its head lowered through the white drifts. A bright orange harness or vest on its chest becomes visible, partially covered in powder, while the hiker's legs remain visible stepping behind the animal in the deep snow.

[54-60] A black and white dog with a visible pink tongue trudges through deep snow, ears perked and partially submerged, advancing toward the camera while a hiker in snow-dusted dark trousers, boots, and camouflage clothing walks beside it. [60-62] The hiker's camouflage-gloved hands reach down to rest on the dog's snow-covered upper back and neck as the animal moves forward with its mouth slightly open. [62-68] The hiker, wearing a camouflage jacket, bends forward and wraps their arms around the dog's neck and upper body, holding the animal steady between their snow-covered legs as the dog faces slightly left in the deep white drifts.

[68-76] A hiker in a snow-covered camouflage jacket bends forward, wrapping arms around a black and white dog standing between their legs in deep snow. The dog faces forward with snow clinging to its fur, its tongue slightly visible, as the hiker maintains a steady hold on the animal's upper body.
[76-80] The camera tilts sharply upward to a grey overcast sky, revealing the brim of a camouflage hat. A large, blurry, snow-dusted dark shape moves extremely close to the lens, obscuring part of the view.
[80-82] The angle lowers to show a figure in the distance wearing a bright orange jacket and a large black backpack covered in snow, walking against a snowy hillside with sparse vegetation.

[82-86] A man wearing a camouflage bucket hat and a bright orange jacket with grey shoulders stands in falling snow, carrying a large black backpack. He smiles broadly, looking right then slightly toward the lens as snow dusts his hat. [86-88] The camera tilts down to reveal deep white snow marked by dark footprints and holes near low bushes. [88-96] The view shifts to a snowy hillside where dense bushes heavily coated in snow line a ridge against a grey sky, with small dark, spiky plants protruding from the deep foreground drifts in a static wintry scene.
